cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is asking why it was one of the author's happiest times. The options are A, B, C, D. Looking back at the passage, the first sentence says, "It was one of the happiest times of my life. I was 29 and had just received my bachelor's degree, graduating with honors despite working two jobs and being a wife and mother." So the main reason for the happiness here is receiving her bachelor's degree. Option B is "she had just received her bachelor's degree." That matches the text directly. Let me check the other options. Option A says she became a good wife and got two jobs. The passage mentions she was a wife and mother and worked two jobs, but that's part of the context, not the reason for the happiness. The happiness is about getting the degree.
